languages.text: "Результат вашего сканирования определяю как точный. Вивисектор выполняет функции подготовки носителя к установке максимально эффективной конфигурации".

traits.locale_text: "Ответ положительный. Вивисектор выполняет функции подготовки носителя к установке истинно-верной конфигурации".

languages.text: "I deem the results of your scan to be accurate. The Vivisector performs the functions of preparing the carrier for installation of the maximum-efficiency configuration."
languages.original_text: "Результат вашего сканирования определяю как точный. Вивисектор выполняет функции подготовки носителя к установке максимально эффективной конфигурации".

traits.locale_text: "I deem the results of your scan to be accurate. The Vivisector performs the functions of preparing the carrier for installation of the maximum-efficiency configuration."
"I deem the results of your scan to be accurate. The Vivisector performs the functions of preparing the carrier for installation of the maximum-efficiency configuration."
"Response affirmative. The Vivisector performs the functions of preparing the carrier for installation of the true-perfect configuration."
"I deem the results of your scan to be accurate. The Vivisector performs the functions of preparing the carrier for installation of the maximum-efficiency configuration."
"I deem the results of your scan to be accurate. The Vivisector performs the functions of preparing the carrier for installation of the maximum-efficiency configuration."

languages.text: 「反応は肯定的です。バイセクターは真完全構成の搭載準備を行いる」
languages.original_text: "Response affirmative. The Vivisector performs the functions of preparing the carrier for installation of the true-perfect configuration."

traits.locale_text: 「反応は肯定的です。バイセクターは真完全構成の搭載準備を行います。」

languages.text: "Tarama sonuçlarını onaylıyorum. Dirikesimci, taşıyıcıyı maksimum verimlilik sağlayacak konfigürasyonun kurulumuna hazırlama işlevlerini yerine getirir."
languages.original_text: "I deem the results of your scan to be accurate. The Vivisector performs the functions of preparing the carrier for installation of the maximum-efficiency configuration."

traits.locale_text: "Tarama sonuçlarını onaylıyorum. Dirikesimci, taşıyıcıyı maksimum verimlilik sağlayacak konfigürasyonun kurulumuna hazırlama işlevlerini yerine getirir."

languages.text: «Considero que los resultados de su análisis son precisos. El vivisector ejecuta las tareas de preparación del portador para instalar la configuración de eficacia máxima».
languages.original_text: "I deem the results of your scan to be accurate. The Vivisector performs the functions of preparing the carrier for installation of the maximum-efficiency configuration."

traits.locale_text: «Considero que los resultados de su análisis son precisos. El vivisector ejecuta las tareas de preparación del portador para instalar la configuración de eficacia máxima».

languages.text: “扫描结果无误。解剖者负责为最大效率构造的安装准备载体。”
languages.original_text: "I deem the results of your scan to be accurate. The Vivisector performs the functions of preparing the carrier for installation of the maximum-efficiency configuration."

traits.locale_text: “扫描结果无误。解剖者负责为最大效率构造的安装准备载体。”

languages.text: « Les résultats de votre analyse paraissent adéquats. Le vivisector se charge de préparer le porteur avant l'installation de la configuration d'efficacité optimale. »
languages.original_text: "I deem the results of your scan to be accurate. The Vivisector performs the functions of preparing the carrier for installation of the maximum-efficiency configuration."

traits.locale_text: « Les résultats de votre analyse paraissent adéquats. Le vivisector se charge de préparer le porteur avant l'installation de la configuration d'efficacité optimale. »

languages.text: "Ich halte die Ergebnisse Eures Scans für akkurat. Der Vivisektor erfüllt die Funktion der Vorbereitung des Trägers auf die Installation der maximal effektiven Konfiguration."
languages.original_text: "I deem the results of your scan to be accurate. The Vivisector performs the functions of preparing the carrier for installation of the maximum-efficiency configuration."

traits.locale_text: "Ich halte die Ergebnisse Eures Scans für akkurat. Der Vivisektor erfüllt die Funktion der Vorbereitung des Trägers auf die Installation der maximal effektiven Konfiguration."
